name.str_pl: copies of Report: LAUGHING DANCER metallurgy

description: A series of documents discussing the properties of the armor and weapons used by a group or organization only referred to as "LAUGHING DANCER".  Some of these described specifications don't seem physically possible.
A set of documents describing some kind of esoteric martial art that apparently controls the plants and power of nature.  Their are repeated references to "lashing vines" and "poison claws."
